primary_text:
This week's eggs from Farmer Brown are ridiculous. Deep orange yolks, firm whites, shells you actually have to crack.

That's what happens when chickens live on pasture instead of in sheds. The difference shows up on your plate.

FarmThru brings food like this from named regenerative farms across NSW. Pasture-raised chicken. Wild-caught salmon. 100% grass-fed beef. Biodynamic dairy.

It arrives at the Brookvale hub days after it leaves the farm. Not weeks.

Grab what's fresh before the weekend.
headline: These yolks are a different colour
description: Pasture-raised eggs and regenerative groceries. Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday.
creative_brief: Overhead shot of cracked egg in a pan -- deep orange yolk on white. Rustic timber surface. Natural morning light. No filters needed.
